parents.subject: LU-5761 tests: re-add test_89 to replay-single ALWAYS_EXCEPT

commit.subject: LU-10350 tests: get inode count for ost-pools test 1n
commit.message:
LU-10350 tests: get inode count for ost-pools test 1n

This is a deug patch to collect information to determine why
several ost-pools tests are failing with 'File too large'.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly clientcount=2 osscount=1 ostcount=7 mdscount=1 mdtcount=1 testgroup=full
Signed-off-by: James Nunez <james.a.nunez@intel.com>
Change-Id: Ib4998ab591228141f26010efadd240b1545931ee
